extra.reason: Scaffold complete and builds end-to-end (TS typecheck, vite build, cargo build). Named SignetPDF/org.signetpdf throughout.
Licence, README, .editorconfig, ESLint+Prettier, and headless Vitest in place. typecheck/test/lint all green.
pdf.js integrated with the worker bundled via Vite ?url; loader+render modules added; page-count test green. Build emits the worker as a standalone asset.
open_pdf command added (dialog -> bytes); read_pdf_file unit-tested (2 cargo tests pass); rustfmt + clippy clean.
Open button invokes open_pdf and renders all pages stacked/scrollable via renderAllPages; fixture renders all pages on startup. Frontend gate green.
Zoom in/out/fit-width re-render at scale; pure zoom module unit-tested (clamp + fit). Frontend gate green.
Size limit enforced in Rust (tested boundary); non-PDF rejected by pdf.js; failed loads keep prior render and show a status alert. Rust+frontend gates green.

CSP + freezePrototype + withGlobalTauri:false landed; capability is core-default only with no JS-exposed plugin commands; assets emit as files for a tight connect-src. Config test green; cargo build validates. Write-path guard moved to m1-8 (no save commands yet). Live render under CSP to be confirmed in tauri dev.
CI matrix green on ubuntu/macos/windows: lint, typecheck, Vitest, cargo fmt/clippy/test, and Tauri release build. LF enforced via .gitattributes for cross-platform prettier.

M0 DoD met: app opens and renders all pages of complex PDFs with working zoom (user-verified live); CI matrix green on linux/macos/windows (lint+typecheck+test+build); no worker errors under the hardened CSP; corrupt/non-PDF/oversized input handled (m0-10). Write-path scoping carried into m1-8.
Walking skeleton complete: Tauri 2 + Vite + TypeScript app opens/renders/zooms PDFs, hardened webview, green cross-platform CI.
DocumentModel + createModel added; readonly interfaces, branded UserSpacePoint, frozen empty model. Compile-time + runtime immutability tested. Gate green.
setFieldValue immutable mutator added (add/replace, dirty, input untouched, frozen). 4 tests cover it; gate green.
add/update/remove annotation mutators added; central createId helper; id-based, immutable, frozen. 4 mutation tests + id test; gate green (26 total).
capturePageGeometry (unrotated size + rotation, one canonical space) and immutable withPages added; /Rotate 90 fixture verifies rotation handling. Gate green (30 tests).

modelToScreen added in one module; replicates pdf.js viewport transform (cross-checked against convertToViewportPoint for rot 0 and 90); branded ScreenPoint; table-driven tests for all rotations. Gate green (44 tests).
screenToModel exact inverse added (same module); round-trip property test green across rotations/scales/grid. Gate green (46 tests).

Corpus added: acroform (all field types), xfa (/XFA refusal), linearized, encrypted-empty + encrypted-password (qpdf AES-256), large (300pp). Verified via pdf.js/pdf-lib/qpdf; documented in fixtures/README.
Pure saveModel (model->pdf-lib->bytes) added; empty-model golden round-trip preserves page count + AcroForm field set across all non-XFA fixtures. Gate green (51 tests).
save_pdf/save_pdf_as added with atomic temp+rename writes and a dialog-granted-path guard (canonicalized); open_pdf grants opened path. 8 cargo tests (incl. refuse-non-granted); fmt+clippy clean.
